title: [Thanatoph, Stone Valley]
description: The ground slopes gently down towards the twin peaks of Thanatoph.  A wispy tendril of smoke rises from a structure built into the mountain halfway up between the peaks.  You see a strange collection of fallen trees and underbrush in a pile to your southeast.

wayto.3566: ;e group_members = nil; clear.reverse.each { |line| if line =~ /^Obvious (paths|exits)/; break; elsif line =~ /^([A-Za-z ,]+) followed\.$/; group_members = $1.split(/, | and /); group_members.delete_if { |m| m =~ /^[Yy]our / }; group_members = nil if group_members.empty?; break; end }; move 'go pile'; if group_members; echo "Waiting for your group... "; begin; if get =~ /^(You reach out and hold )?([A-z][a-z]+)('s hand| joins your group)\.$/; group_members.delete $2; end; end while group_members.length > 0; end; waitrt?
